query:
INSERT INTO island_guides (name, slug, contentType, atoll, overview, published, featured, displayOrder)
VALUES ('Eydhafushi', 'eydhafushi-baa', 'island', 'Baa Atoll', 'Eydhafushi is an island in Baa Atoll known for its local charm and authentic Maldivian experience.', 1, 0, 0);
